'''Huorne''' was an [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] serving in the [[Investigations/Legends|Investigations]] branch. Alongside [[Parl]], Huorne engaged in a series of gambits against the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic's]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]] which made them famous.
